name: sync-local-doc-to-data-wiki
description: Personal lark-cli workflow for publishing local Markdown documents into a configured Lark/Feishu Data Wiki directory.

interface.displayName: Sync Local Docs to Lark Data Wiki
interface.shortDescription: lark-cli workflow for publishing Markdown to Wiki
interface.longDescription: A personal workflow skill and thin helper script for using lark-cli to sync local Markdown documents into a configured Lark/Feishu Wiki directory without committing private Wiki URLs, tokens, user IDs, or local paths.
defaultPrompt: Sync this local Markdown file to the Data Wiki.
Publish this requirement doc into the configured Lark Wiki.
Update the matching Data Wiki child page from this local doc.
